title: WebSiteCreate
description: Request body for creating a new web site.

name.description: The name of the web site to create.

physical_path.description: The physical file system path for the web site root directory. The directory must exist.

bindings.description: The bindings for the web site.

id.description: The identifier of the application pool.

server_auto_start.description: Whether the web site starts automatically when IIS starts.

enabled_protocols.description: The protocols enabled for this web site.
